pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against the previous JDK version (or default), failing to produce bytecode compatible with Java 21 features or runtime.

refarch-gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
refarch-gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.
